description: Detect and record periods when a vehicle is stationary, capturing stop location, start time, end time, and duration, to support idle time analysis, delivery dwell time reporting, and route compliance.

actors.name: Position Processing Pipeline
actors.description: Identifies stationary periods from consecutive positions using speed and time thresholds

actors.name: Fleet User
actors.description: Reviews stop reports to analyse idle time, unscheduled stops, and delivery durations

fields.name: stop_start_time
fields.description: Timestamp when movement ceased and the stop began

fields.name: stop_end_time
fields.description: Timestamp when movement resumed and the stop ended

fields.name: stop_duration_seconds
fields.description: Total duration of the stop in seconds

fields.name: stop_gap_seconds
fields.description: Minimum seconds of stillness required before a period is classified as a stop

rules: A stop is detected when the device remains below the motion speed threshold for at least stop_gap_seconds
Short stationary periods below stop_gap_seconds (e.g., red lights, traffic) are not classified as stops
A stop ends and a new trip may begin when the device's speed exceeds the motion threshold again
Stop location is the coordinates at which movement first ceased; minor GPS drift during a stop is ignored
Stop records include the reverse-geocoded address when available
Stops that overlap with geofence zones are annotated with the zone name for context
Engine hours and fuel data at stop boundaries are recorded to support idle fuel consumption analysis

given: device speed has been below the motion threshold for >= stop_gap_seconds
device was previously in a moving state

then.description: Stop detected event recorded with type = device_stopped, stop start time and coordinates

stop_detected.result: Stop record started; location, time, and sensor values at stop onset captured

given: device resumes movement after a recorded stop
stop_ended.result: Stop record closed with end time and duration; available for stop reports

given: device speed dropped to zero but resumed movement within stop_gap_seconds
brief_halt_ignored.result: Short halt ignored; no stop record created (traffic light, junction, etc.)

errors.message: The device referenced does not exist

events.name: stop.detected
events.description: Vehicle has come to a stop for longer than the minimum stop threshold

events.name: stop.ended
events.description: Vehicle has resumed movement after a recorded stop

related.description: Stops are the inverse of trips; both use the same motion state machine
Position speed values drive stop detection
Stops inside geofences are annotated with zone context
Stop records feed into scheduled stop reports
